questions.question: During SAFECON message drop, somehow the streamer from your container detached and ended up stuck to the edge of your 74-inch diameter McCauley propeller. At the maximum certified 2,700 RPM at sea level on a standard day, how many times the speed of sound will the streamer be whipped around?

On your circular E6B, the distance from the center grommet to the index is 6.5 cm. Assuming you need to spin the wheel three and a half rotations per question, how far does the index travel over a full 40-question Computer Accuracy test?

You know that a Boeing 737's hydraulic system is pressurized to a maximum of 3500 psi when all four pumps are operating. If the piston within the hydraulic cylinder has a diameter of 9 inches, how much hydraulic force can this system output?

Your performance chart instructs you to add 12% to the takeoff ground roll for every 2 percent of runway slope. In current weather conditions, the chart indicates a takeoff ground roll of 827'. If the runway is 5,500' long, and the elevation differs by 240' between each end, what will your takeoff ground roll be?
You're hungry and trying to determine the best pizza deal. A Medium 12" diameter pizza is $14.99 and a Large 14" diameter pizza is $18.99. How much bigger is the large pizza?
Engine indications for turbine engines can be displayed as a percentage of maximum rotational speed. If the maximum for a given engine is 9000 RPM, what is 73% of that?

Your aircraft navigation system measures the drift of its computed position from actual position. Currently that drift is 0.15 NM per hour. After flying 752 SM at an average ground speed of 218 knots, the computed position could be within an area of how many nautical miles from the actual position?

The differential cabin pressure at 37,000' is 8.3 PSI. An unruly passenger tries to open a 1.0 meter by 1.5 meter plug-type emergency exit door. How many pounds of force would be required to open the door?
If an aircraft climbs at 670 FPM at a groundspeed of 96 knots, how high will it have climbed after 14 minutes?
